title: Enakkaga Poranthaye Lyrics Pannaiyarum Padminiyum Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Enakkaga Poranthaye
Singer(s): S.P.B.Charan, Anu Anand
Movie: Pannaiyarum Padminiyum
Music: Justin Prabhakaran

Enakkaga Poranthaye enathazhagi
irupene manasellaam unnai ezhudhi

Enakkaga Poranthaye enathazhagi
irupene manasellaam unnai ezhudhi

Unakku maalayittu varusanga pona enna
pogadhu unnoda paasam
ennaku emmelathaan aasayilla
ummelathaan vachen
endha oosi indri
noolum indri unnodathaan thachen

Unakkaaga porandheney enathazhagaa
piriyama irupene pagal iravaa
unakku vaakkapattu varusanga pona enna
pogaadhu unndoa paasam
ennaku emmelathaan aasayilla
ummelathaan vachen
endha oosi indri
noolum indri unnodathaan thachen.

Odhungaadey thottu
usupethi vittu
unakaa oovoru madhiri
naakkula nenjula pachaya kuthi vachen.

Idhudhaandhi radham
idhuvethaan nelam
unnathaan otkaaravchi naan
rasaadhi raasaa naan oorgolam vandhidiven.

Aathoram kaathaadum
kaathodu naathaadum.
naan paathaatamaa, naathaatamaa ..
un nizhalum naalum
nee maalaydum velai idhu
ketkudhu yen thozhu ...

Unakkaaga porandheney enathazhagaa
piriyama irupene pagal iravaa
Unakku maalayittu varusanga pona enna
pogadhu unnoda paasam

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Enakkaga Poranthaye?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and affection, highlighting the emotional connection between the lovers.

What is the plot context of the movie Pannaiyarum Padminiyum?

The movie revolves around the relationship between a man and his beloved car, symbolizing love and attachment.

Who are the singers of the song?

The song is sung by Anu Anand and SPB Charan.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Enakkaga Poranthaye was composed by Justin Prabhakaran.

When was the song released?

The song was released on November 23, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Enakkaga Poranthaye, the protagonists express their heartfelt emotions through a melodious duet that resonates with the theme of love. The song beautifully captures the essence of longing and affection, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. The soothing melody, combined with the heartfelt lyrics, evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. This track stands out as a memorable piece in the film Pannaiyarum Padminiyum, leaving listeners enchanted.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Enakkaga Poranthaye is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Anu Anand and SPB Charan, this song from the film Pannaiyarum Padminiyum is sure to tug at your heartstrings. Justin Prabhakaran's soulful composition elevates the emotional depth, making it a must-listen for romantic souls.
stanzaMeanings: I was born for you, my beauty is here, my heart writes about you.
I was born for you, my beauty is here, my heart writes about you.
What can I do if you have gone away with a garland? My love for you is my only desire, without you, I have nothing, this thread of life is tied to you.

I was born for you, my beauty is here, I cannot be separated from you, day or night, what can I do if you have gone away? My love for you is my only desire, without you, I have nothing, this thread of life is tied to you.
Don't run away, I have put my heart in your hands, like a sweet fruit in my mouth.
This is the rhythm, this is the earth, I am the one who will sing, I will come to the village.
I will be with you, I have given myself to the Lord, I will not lose.
I will not lose my way, I will not lose my path. I have seen you, I have seen you, your shadow and your days are like a garland, this is what I hear, my friend...
I was born for you, my beauty is here, I cannot be separated from you, day or night.
